description: OneStream Framework for managing HTTP API Requests without coding
author: Nova-Praxis
purpose: Enables consultants/developers to configure and execute REST API calls within OneStream Business Rules and Data Management Steps

workspace_assemblies.name: RESTAPIRequestManager
workspace_assemblies.description: Core classes and utilities for REST API requests

business_rules.name: RESTAPIFramework_SharedFunctions
business_rules.description: Shared utility functions including DataTable operations, dimension member lookups

business_rules.name: RESTAPIFramework_PopulateTable
business_rules.description: Data Management Step extender for populating custom tables via saved requests

parameters.p_request_name: Name of the saved request to execute
parameters.p_variables: Optional key-value pairs to override request variables (format: [key1]=[value1],[key2]=[value2])

dashboard.name: RESTAPIFramework_MainNavigation
dashboard.description: RESTFAST UI Dashboard for managing API requests
features: Configure HTTP method, endpoint, headers, body, params
Setup authentication (Basic, Bearer, API Key, OAuth 2.0)
Test requests with live response preview
Configure data retrieval options (pagination, column mappings)
Populate custom tables directly from dashboard

custom_tables.purpose: Store REST API response data for staging or direct use
custom_tables.note: Tables can be used as staging tables for merging into dimension/fact tables

main_workflows.name: UI-Based Request Configuration
steps: 2. Create new request with unique name
7. Configure data retrieval options (dataKey, nextLinkKey, columnMappings)
8. Populate custom table directly or save for later use

main_workflows.name: Business Rule Integration
steps: 3. Use Utils functions to get/execute saved requests
4. Process responses or populate tables programmatically

main_workflows.name: Data Management Step
steps: 5. Execute to populate custom table automatically

key_features: Built-in authentication support (Basic, Bearer, API Key, OAuth 2.0)
Automatic pagination handling (via nextLink or manual top/skip)
Variable substitution in endpoint, params, headers, body
JSON response parsing with dataKey path navigation
Column mapping for flexible data transformation
Testing interface with live response preview
Integration with OneStream Business Rules and DM Steps
authentication_methods: OAuth 2.0 (Client Credentials, Password, Authorization Code, Refresh Token, Device Code, Custom)
references: Technical Documentation: See RestFast technical docs
Package Files: See RESTFAST_Package v1.2 distribution
